acceptance_criteria.criterion: Append-only edge writer exists for SPLIT_SIBLING/REDIRECT edge types
covered_by: EdgeType (EdgeSplitSibling, EdgeRedirect) + Edge struct in edge_append.go

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Edges are retrievable, including source fileID
Durability (survives being re-read from disk, not just in-memory state)
covered_by: EdgeAppender backed by wal.Writer's fsync-before-return Append
verified_by_test: TestMinimalEdgeAppend (ReadAll called independently of the appender)

covered_by: ReadAll iterates segment files in ascending numeric order and records within a segment in on-disk order (wal.ReadSegment)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Genuinely minimal: no CSR storage/compaction/traversal API
covered_by: No traversal, no per-fileID index, no compaction logic anywhere in edge_append.go

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Fail closed on invalid edge type (matches wal.RecordTypeInvalid convention)
covered_by: AppendEdge rejects EdgeTypeInvalid; decodeEdge rejects unrecognized on-disk type byte

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No regression to engine/wal or rest of engine module
covered_by: engine/graph only imports engine/wal read-only; no other package imports engine/graph yet

notes: Self-consistency only (internal sanity: build green + matrix covered). Independent verification is delegated to /cdr:verify per invariant I4.
